data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Separate preview/download permissions', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this specific requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for separate permissions, yet the prior steps do not include any specific checks or validations related to this aspect. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of separate preview/download permissions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the separate preview/download permissions.
